game_info.title: ULTRAKILL: Blood Arena
game_info.concept:
ULTRAKILL is a fast-paced ultraviolent retro FPS combining the skill-based style scoring from character action games with unadulterated carnage inspired by the best shooters of the '90s. Rip apart your foes with varied destructive weapons and shower in their blood to regain your health.

ULTRAKILL is a fast-paced ultraviolent old school FPS that fuses together classic shooters like Quake, modern shooters like Doom (2016) and character action games like Devil May Cry.

Mankind has gone extinct and the only beings left on earth are machines fueled by blood.
But now that blood is starting to run out on the surface...
Machines are racing to the depths of Hell in search of more.



  • Use your many movement abilities to stay mobile and avoid the relentless attacks of the dead, demons and other machines.
  • Destroy them with an arsenal of incredibly powerful weapons, each with multiple available variations.
  • Soak yourself in their blood to regain health and keep fighting.



  • Kill fast and with SSStyle to rack up combos and gain points that can be used on weapon variations between missions.
  • Master the many levels to achieve high ranks and take on unique optional challenges.
  • Explore the varied and unique campaign environments inspired by Dante's Inferno to find plentiful hidden secrets
game_info.description: You are V1, a blood-fueled machine battling through the depths of Hell. Enemies spawn in waves - destroy them with your arsenal to collect their blood and restore health. Movement is key: dash through the arena, jump to dodge attacks. Chain kills quickly for style points and score multipliers. Survive all waves to achieve victory. Death means game over - keep moving, keep killing, keep bleeding.
game_info.controls:
W/A/S/D: Move forward/left/backward/right
Space: Jump
Shift: Dash (quick dodge in movement direction)
Arrow Keys: Look around / Aim
Z: Shoot weapon
Mouse movement: Disabled (keyboard only)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement, shooting, and enemy spawning mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate the arena, shoot projectiles, and enemies appear correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move in a circular pattern around the arena using WASD keys. Fire projectiles using Z key at spawned enemies. Test dash ability with Shift key. Jump periodically with Space to test vertical movement.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly, projectiles should fire in the direction the player is facing, enemies should spawn at regular intervals. Test is successful when player survives for 30 seconds with at least 3 enemies destroyed.
TEST_1.description: Testing basic movement, shooting, and enemy spawning mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate the arena, shoot projectiles, and enemies appear correctly.
TEST_1.strategy: Move in a circular pattern around the arena using WASD keys. Fire projectiles using Z key at spawned enemies. Test dash ability with Shift key. Jump periodically with Space to test vertical movement.
TEST_1.expected: Player should move smoothly, projectiles should fire in the direction the player is facing, enemies should spawn at regular intervals. Test is successful when player survives for 30 seconds with at least 3 enemies destroyed.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing win condition by rapidly eliminating all enemy waves. Validates combat mechanics, health system, and victory state transition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively seek out and destroy all spawned enemies using rapid fire (Z key). Move directly toward enemies to collect blood particles. Complete all enemy waves as quickly as possible.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All enemy waves should be cleared, player should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score and style rank should be displayed. Test succeeds when victory screen appears with final statistics.
TEST_2.description: Testing win condition by rapidly eliminating all enemy waves. Validates combat mechanics, health system, and victory state transition.

TEST_2.expected: All enemy waves should be cleared, player should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score and style rank should be displayed. Test succeeds when victory screen appears with final statistics.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing health and blood collection system. Validates that taking damage reduces health and collecting blood restores it.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally take damage from enemies by staying close to them. After health drops, collect blood particles to restore health. Monitor health bar changes throughout.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Health should decrease when hit by enemies, increase when collecting blood particles. Player should die if health reaches zero. Test succeeds when health mechanics work consistently.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing collision detection and physics. Validates player-enemy collisions, projectile-enemy collisions, and boundary constraints.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Navigate close to enemies to test collision. Fire projectiles at enemies from various angles and distances. Attempt to move beyond arena boundaries.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Projectiles should hit enemies and cause damage. Player should stay within arena bounds. Collisions should be detected accurately. Test succeeds when all collision types work correctly.
TEST_4.description: Testing collision detection and physics. Validates player-enemy collisions, projectile-enemy collisions, and boundary constraints.
TEST_4.strategy: Navigate close to enemies to test collision. Fire projectiles at enemies from various angles and distances. Attempt to move beyond arena boundaries.
TEST_4.expected: Projectiles should hit enemies and cause damage. Player should stay within arena bounds. Collisions should be detected accurately. Test succeeds when all collision types work correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing style system and combo mechanics. Validates that killing enemies quickly increases style rank and score multiplier.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Kill multiple enemies in rapid succession without taking damage. Maintain aggressive play to build up combo counter. Use dash and movement to stay mobile.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Style rank should increase with consecutive kills. Score should multiply based on style rank. Combo counter should reset after period without kills. Test succeeds when style system responds to player performance.
TEST_5.description: Testing style system and combo mechanics. Validates that killing enemies quickly increases style rank and score multiplier.
TEST_5.strategy: Kill multiple enemies in rapid succession without taking damage. Maintain aggressive play to build up combo counter. Use dash and movement to stay mobile.
TEST_5.expected: Style rank should increase with consecutive kills. Score should multiply based on style rank. Combo counter should reset after period without kills. Test succeeds when style system responds to player performance.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing pause and restart functionality. Validates that game can be paused, resumed, and restarted properly.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Press ESC to pause during gameplay. Verify game freezes. Press ESC again to resume. After some gameplay, press R to restart and return to start screen.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Game should pause all updates when ESC is pressed. Resume correctly on second ESC press. R key should reset game to start screen. Test succeeds when all phase transitions work correctly.
TEST_6.description: Testing pause and restart functionality. Validates that game can be paused, resumed, and restarted properly.
TEST_6.strategy: Press ESC to pause during gameplay. Verify game freezes. Press ESC again to resume. After some gameplay, press R to restart and return to start screen.
TEST_6.expected: Game should pause all updates when ESC is pressed. Resume correctly on second ESC press. R key should reset game to start screen. Test succeeds when all phase transitions work correctly.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing camera and aiming system. Validates that arrow keys control camera rotation and affect projectile direction.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Use arrow keys to rotate camera view in all directions. Fire projectiles while rotating to test aim direction. Verify camera follows player smoothly.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Camera should rotate based on arrow key input. Projectiles should fire in camera-facing direction. Camera should maintain proper distance from player. Test succeeds when camera and aiming feel responsive.
TEST_7.description: Testing camera and aiming system. Validates that arrow keys control camera rotation and affect projectile direction.
TEST_7.strategy: Use arrow keys to rotate camera view in all directions. Fire projectiles while rotating to test aim direction. Verify camera follows player smoothly.
TEST_7.expected: Camera should rotate based on arrow key input. Projectiles should fire in camera-facing direction. Camera should maintain proper distance from player. Test succeeds when camera and aiming feel responsive.
